items.title: Oil prices plunge as Iran says Strait 'open'
items.summary: Brent crude sinks 10% after Iran says the key waterway is completely open for commercial ships for the rest of the ceasefire.

items.title: Ceasefire with Israel brings respite to Lebanon, but obstacles to peace remain
items.summary: The halt to weeks of fighting is being celebrated in Lebanon, but it will be difficult to ensure it lasts.

items.title: Mugabe's son pleads guilty to pointing a gun in South Africa
items.summary: Bellarmine Mugabe was arrested in February following the shooting of a 23-year-old man at his home in Johannesburg.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 川普：伊朗同意永不封鎖荷姆茲  水雷完全清除
items.summary: 在伊朗17日宣布於以色列與黎巴嫩停火10天期間，全面開放荷姆茲海峽後，川普在社交平台「真實社群」一連串發文，表示伊朗已同意永遠不再封鎖荷姆茲海峽，同時在美國的協助下，伊朗已移除...…

items.title: 美伊和談進入最後衝刺 川普政府考慮解凍200億美元伊朗資產
items.summary: 美國有線電視新聞網（CNN）17日報導，根據2名知情人士，作為與德黑蘭當局持續談判的一環，川普政府正在考慮解凍價值200億美元（約台幣6280.7億元）的伊朗資產。  儘管...…

items.title: 川普駁斥解凍伊朗資產換濃縮鈾 稱以色列「被禁止」再轟炸黎巴嫩
items.summary: 美國新聞網站Axios 17日引述4名消息來源說法，指美國和伊朗正磋商，美國釋出遭凍結的伊朗資產，交換伊朗放棄濃縮鈾庫存。不過，美國總統川普17日發文顯然否認這篇報導。川普也表...…
